member.name: T:OpenFiscalCore.System.Integration.Adapters.ExternalDependencyFailureException
member.summary: Wraps transport, device, certificate, and filesystem failures raised while realizing a canonical external dependency interface.

member.name: T:OpenFiscalCore.System.Integration.Adapters.ExternalDependencyFailureKind
member.summary: Classifies adapter-level dependency failures after transport or technology details are translated into canonical boundary errors.
